overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of a foggy industrial train yard. The camera drifts through misty surroundings revealing derailed boxcars and industrial structures before tracking a steam locomotive as it billows smoke through the scene.

segments.scene_description: The camera drifts through a foggy rural landscape revealing derailed wooden boxcars scattered beside overgrown railway tracks. Power lines stretch across the misty field as the view explores the abandoned railway wreckage.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to reveal an industrial train yard with a prominent wooden water tower and weathered warehouse buildings. The derailed cars fade into the background as the camera approaches the maintenance structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate rural landscape that gradually reveals a bustling, misty industrial train yard. It begins by drifting through a foggy field, passing derailed wooden boxcars and power lines scattered along overgrown railway tracks. As the camera moves forward, the wreckage fades into the background and the scene opens up to reveal weathered warehouse buildings and a prominent wooden water tower. The view then shifts as a steam locomotive suddenly emerges from the fog on the right, billowing a thick plume of black smoke. The camera tracks the train's steady progress through the industrial haze before the locomotive finally disappears into the distance.
